summary: Complete testing of Phase 3: CxC/CxP enhanced with aging buckets, abonos, KPI summaries, manual creation, and improved UI. Backend: 19/19 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All UI elements verified including KPIs, aging filters, estado filters, expandable rows, create modals, and abono modals.

backend_api.GET /api/cxc?empresa_id=6: PASS - Returns list with enhanced fields (cliente_nombre, tipo_origen, dias_atraso, total_abonado, aging_bucket, marca_nombre)
backend_api.GET /api/cxc/resumen?empresa_id=6: PASS - Returns total_docs, total_pendiente, total_vencido, docs_vencidos, por_vencer_7d, aging buckets (vigente, 0_30, 31_60, 61_90, 90_plus)
backend_api.POST /api/cxc?empresa_id=6: PASS - Creates manual CxC, returns id
backend_api.GET /api/cxc/{id}/abonos?empresa_id=6: PASS - Returns list of abonos for CxC
backend_api.POST /api/cxc/{id}/abonos - creates and: PASS - Creates abono, updates saldo_pendiente and estado to 'parcial' or 'cobrada'
backend_api.GET /api/cxp?empresa_id=6: PASS - Returns list with enhanced fields (proveedor_nombre, dias_vencido, total_abonado, aging_bucket)
backend_api.GET /api/cxp/resumen?empresa_id=6: PASS - Returns summary with aging buckets
backend_api.POST /api/cxp/{id}/abonos - estado='paga: PASS - Uses correct PostgreSQL enum value 'pagado' (NOT 'pagada')
backend_api.CxC partial payment flow: PASS - Create -> partial abono -> estado=parcial -> full abono -> estado=cobrada
backend_api.CxP partial payment flow: PASS - Create -> partial abono -> estado=parcial -> full abono -> estado=pagado

frontend_ui.CxC Page - KPI Total Pendiente: PASS - Displays correct value with document count
frontend_ui.CxC Page - KPI Total Vencido: PASS - Displays in red with doc count
frontend_ui.CxC Page - Aging bucket buttons (Todos,: PASS - All 6 buttons present with counts and totals
frontend_ui.CxC Page - Estado filter dropdown: PASS - Options: Pendiente, Parcial, Cobrada, Anulada
frontend_ui.CxC Page - Table columns: PASS - Cliente, Origen, Vencimiento, Monto, Abonado, Saldo, Estado, Acciones
frontend_ui.CxC Page - Expandable rows: PASS - Click row to expand detail panel showing tipo, marca, notas, and abonos list
frontend_ui.CxC Page - Abonar button: PASS - Opens abono modal for non-cobrada/anulada items
frontend_ui.CxC Create Modal - All fields: PASS - Cliente, Monto, Fecha Vencimiento, Doc. Referencia, Notas
frontend_ui.CxC Abono Modal - All fields: PASS - Fecha, Monto (with max placeholder), Forma de Pago, Cuenta Destino, Referencia
frontend_ui.CxC Toast notifications: PASS - 'CxC creada' and 'Abono registrado' toasts confirmed
frontend_ui.CxP Page - KPIs: PASS - Total Pendiente, Vencido, Por Vencer
frontend_ui.CxP Create Modal: PASS - Proveedor, Monto, Fecha Vencimiento, Tipo Origen (Compra/Servicio/Alquiler/Planilla/Gasto), Doc. Referencia
frontend_ui.CxP Pago Modal: PASS - Fecha, Monto, Forma de Pago (Transferencia/Efectivo/Cheque/Letra), Cuenta Origen, Referencia

design_review.KPI cards: PASS - Good contrast, proper styling with kpi-label and kpi-value classes
design_review.Aging bucket buttons: PASS - Color-coded (green=vigente, amber=0-30, orange=31-60, red=61-90, dark red=90+)
design_review.Estado badges: PASS - Colored badges (warning=pendiente, info=parcial, success=cobrada/pagado, neutral=anulada)
design_review.Table layout: PASS - Proper column alignment, text-right for monetary columns
design_review.Modal forms: PASS - Clean layout with proper labels and inputs
design_review.Expandable row detail: PASS - Light gray background, two-column grid layout

test_credentials.test_data: CxC/CxP records created during testing have 'TEST-' prefix

seed_data_creation: Test data created with prefixes: TEST-CXC-001, E2E-TEST-CXC-ABONO, TEST-CXP-001, etc. These can be cleaned up if needed.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 3 CxC/CxP fully tested. Backend endpoints in /app/backend/routers/cxc_cxp.py handle: list with filters (estado, aging), resumen with aging buckets, manual creation, and abonos with validation. CxC uses varchar estado ('pendiente', 'parcial', 'cobrada', 'anulada'). CxP uses PostgreSQL enum estado_factura ('pendiente', 'parcial', 'pagado', 'canjeado', 'anulada') - note 'pagado' NOT 'pagada'. Frontend pages /cxc and /cxp have full CRUD with modals, KPI cards, aging filters, and expandable rows showing abonos history.
